segments.speaker: 题目19/20
segments.text: Listen to an announcement at a school event. Please attend the campus music festival happening next Saturday on the main quad. This free event will feature student bands, local artists and a special guest performance by an acting troop from the city. To complement the performances, a variety of food trucks and beverage stands will be available, offering options like tacos, smoothies and vegetarian snacks. There will also be a community art wall where students can contribute drawings or messages throughout the day. Contact the student activities office for more information.
